changes:
Banner centering fix:
- Fixed ASCII art banner alignment for proper center positioning
- Removed aggressive whitespace trimming that caused misalignment
- Preserved original ASCII art spacing for consistent display
- Improved terminal width calculation for accurate centering

UI enhancement & update improvements:
- Modern download progress bar with live percentage and dynamic spinner
- Smooth transition from loading percentage to 'Done' status upon completion
- Refined progress display for better visibility and fewer visual artifacts
- Enhanced error handling for download progress edge cases (missing content-length)
- Version bump to v4.2.2

Refinement update - Enhanced stability & UX:
- Refined changelog command: --changelog now displays only the current version's changes
- Added _kill_old_alarms() to prevent overlapping alarm processes
- Strengthened error handling across all schedule/location/alarm functions
- Added file existence check in _play_mp3 to avoid crashes
- Removed --alert-once from notifications for broader Android compatibility
- _schedule_prayer_alarms is now automatically called after schedule generation
- Help text updated to reflect changelog behavior change
- Various internal safeguards and output redirections for zero-noise operation
- config.sh: Added essential dependencies (nodejs, termux-api, bc, sox, mpv)
- config.sh: Automatic Python virtual environment (venv) creation with requests package
- config.sh: Enhanced download error handling with clear failure messages
- config.sh: Post-installation instructions for Termux:API, permissions, and venv usage

Major update - The 'Adzan Smart' release:
- GPS-based location fetching with high accuracy (<10m) stored in ~/.termux/location.json
- Automatic daily prayer time calculation (Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha) using PrayTimes.js
- New commands: --location (show current location), --schedule (show prayer times)
- Smart adzan alarm system:
  * 15 min before: notification + alarm.mp3 (uninterruptible)
  * 30 sec before: sapa.mp3 (uninterruptible)
  * Exact time: notification + adzan.mp3 (uninterruptible)
- Background auto-update of schedule on every Termux launch, with sound notifications
- Automatic download of sound files (alarm.mp3, sapa.mp3, adzan.mp3) from repository
- Multi-player fallback: termux-media-player, play, mpv
- Enhanced error handling and crash prevention in all location/schedule/alarm functions
- New dependency: nodejs, termux-api
- Data directory ~/.termux/ for JSON files and temporary scripts
- --reconfig command to rerun config.sh for easy reconfiguration
- --changelog command to view full version history offline
- Expanded LS_COLORS to include all common file types
- Various internal stability improvements and code cleanup

Major update - The 'Steel Dragon' release:
- Added Python dependency auto-install in config.sh for full feature support
- Pure shell version comparison fallback when Python is not available
- Cleaned up keybindings: unified autocomplete accept and forward-char behavior
- MySQL/MariaDB auto-start now checks if binary exists and respects ENABLE_MYSQL setting
- MySQL startup produces zero log output, completely silent
- Plugin auto-update (_update_plugins) on --update or --updates install
- Changelog cached locally for offline viewing after first fetch
- --updates now defaults to 'scan' if no argument given; added 'install' subcommand
- New --reconfig command to re-run setup script without full reinstall
- Git branch name displayed in prompt (using vcs_info)
- Expanded LS_COLORS with full dircolors-style definitions for better file type visibility
- New configuration options: ENABLE_MYSQL, UPDATE_CHECK saved in ~/.zsh_config
- config.sh now interactively asks for MySQL and auto-update preferences
- Robust error prevention: all functions guarded against missing commands
- Version bumped to v4.0.0

Minor update:
- Added syntax highlighting for custom commands (--help, --version, --updates, --update)
- Polished command not found handler
- Internal version bump

Major update:
- Renamed hostname from 'kali' to 'termux'
- MariaDB auto-start with zero log, no interference with prompt
- Custom command system: --help, --version, --updates scan, --update
- Version now read from .zshrc (no more version.txt dependency)
- Changelog.json replaces Changelog.md, shows relevant changes on update
- Update check compares versions from .zshrc in remote repo
- Download progress animation for each file during update
- Improved error handling and strict crash prevention

Pre-release update:
- Custom command handler for --help and --version
- Version check via version.txt on startup
- Update notification with changelog from Changelog.md
- Directory restructure for Termux-Config
- Initial groundwork for OTA update mechanism

Initial release:
- Kali Linux style prompt with dynamic path & virtualenv indicator
- Autosuggestion (ghost text) from history of successful commands
- Syntax highlighting for commands, options, and paths
- Autocomplete dropdown from history with arrow key selection
- History filtering: only successful commands, no duplicates
- Block cursor styling for better visibility
- Auto-update checking from GitHub repository
- Modern setup script with automatic dependency installation
